'''''The Movie Trilogy Sourcebook''''' was a roleplaying guide published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. It was written by [[Grant S. Boucher]] and [[Michael Stern]], and was first published in September [[1993]].

The book summarizes and details the events of the [[original trilogy]] of ''[[Star Wars]]'' movies. It integrates information from three of the West End Games [[Galaxy Guide]]s—''[[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope]]'', ''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]'', and ''[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi]]''—into one volume, updated for the Second Edition rules.

==Contents==

*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
*[[Palpatine/Legends|The Emperor]]
